name: Triumvirate
description: Multiple factions converge on a site containing three focal nodes. Control the nodes to unlock the central prize, but alliances shift with every Turn.

scoringRules.description: +1 VP per FN controlled per Turn

specialRules.name: Dominance
specialRules.description: At End of Turn, each Side controlling a FN awards +1 VP

specialRules.name: Commander
specialRules.description: Each side designates one Commander (61+ BP). If your Commander is KO'd, you cannot gain Dominance VP on the following Turn

specialRules.name: Central Apex
specialRules.description: No terrain within 4 MU of center point
